subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort was built by Rao Jodha in Jodhpur?
question_hi: राव जोध्यपुर के लैंग्डक को किस सबसे प्रमुख गैर्वेद का निर्माण करने वाला कौन था?
explanation_en:
Jaswant Thada is a famous monument built by Rao Jodha of the Rathore clan to honor his father, Maharaja Jaswant Singh II.
In this question, we are asking about the builder of the monument, not the monument itself.
The correct answer is B: Jaswant Thada.
